apps.name: Game Dev Story (Paid App)
apps.localizedDescription:
Manage your own game company and try to create a million-selling game in this unique simulation.

Features the ability to develop your company's own game console, plus a system for changing your staff members' professions.

Hire talented people and train them to develop their skills.

As your staff gets more experience, you will unlock a wider array of game genres and content to develop. Try to find the most popular combinations and develop for the latest platform!
Your staff members can have a variety of game-related professions, from programmer to sound engineer.

Work hard and you may reach the top of the video game industry!
--

apps.name: Doodle Jump 2+ - Arcade Games
apps.localizedDescription:
One of the original App Store hits and insanely fun gaming sensations is now available in Apple Arcade with delightful environments, the cutest characters, fun platform challenges and a whole bunch of silly monsters.

Jump up on platforms and collect stars to unlock cool new characters and exciting environments. 

Unlock all the levels and collect all the characters! Beat your friends’ high scores and become the new Doodle Jump King!

- Cavemen world with T-rex, triceratops, falling stones, prehistoric turtles…

apps.name: My Dear Farm+ (Apple Arcade)
apps.localizedDescription:
Welcome to your own pocket farm! Decorating and growing your crops has never been as fun and chill in this sim farming-adventure— now better than ever on Apple Arcade!

- CUSTOMIZE your character! Set out into this horticultural adventure being your best farmer self. Change your appearance, hairstyle, and even your pet to your liking!

- MAKE a home in your own farm and your new brand house! Decorate everything as you please to harvest the life you desire!

- LIVE your farmer life with your partner! Having a companion fills the daily life with color and fun, manage your home and farm alongside your loved one, and grow fond of a bunch of memories to come back to.

- GROW your crops to make your business thrive! Once you're done harvesti

apps.name: Pro Snooker & Pool 2025+
apps.localizedDescription:
Following the worldwide success of its sports games iWare Designs brings you Pro Snooker & Pool 2026+, probably one of the most realistic and playable snooker and pool games available on mobile devices. Boasting fully textured game environments and full 3D rigid body physics this game is the complete package for both casual and serious gamers.

The simple click and play interface allows you to pick up and play the game quickly, or alternatively for the more serious players the game includes cue ball control allowing you to perform more advanced shots including back spin, top spin, left spin (Left english), right spin (Right english) and ball swerve. 

So whether you want a simple easy and fun snooker game or a full on simulation this game is
